title: SEO Content Brief
description: Pre-draft handoff from SEO Analyst to Content Writer. Produced by the optimize-seo skill. Validates against seo-analyst.md Output Template and Review Checklist.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema file for validation tooling.

brief_id.description: Unique identifier for this brief. Use slug or YYYY-MM-DD-site-slug format.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when brief was produced.

context.description: Page context and intent framing — required first step before keyword work.

url_or_planned_slug.description: Target URL or planned slug path (repo-relative, e.g. post/guides/thu-thiem-guide.mdx).

working_title.description: Working title for the article before final title optimization.

secondary_intents.description: Additional secondary intents the content should address.

business_outcome.description: Business goal this page serves (lead, trust, education, conversion, etc.).

audience.description: Target audience description (e.g. expats looking for apartments in HCMC).

ymyl_adjacent.description: True if topic touches financial, health, safety, or legal domains. Triggers elevated E-E-A-T requirements and Researcher escalation for regulated claims.

content_length_target.description: Target word count. Default minimum 1400 unless a shorter scoped update is approved.

topical_authority.description: Pillar–cluster mapping and entity SEO requirements. Every brief must have an explicit assignment.

pillar_page_url.description: URL or repo path of the pillar page this article belongs to. Create pillar page first if absent.

cluster_position.description: Position of this article within the topical cluster.

content_freshness_type.description: Freshness classification for editorial and indexing context.

information_gain.description: What this content adds beyond top-3 SERP results. Required — no brief ships without this. E.g. unique data, firsthand experience, local insight, original analysis.

key_entities.description: People, brands, concepts, or locations that must appear for topical coverage.

primary.description: Single primary keyword this page targets. Must be unique on this site within the 7-day window.

secondary.description: 2–4 secondary keywords to address in body content.

cannibalization_check.description: Result of cannibalization check against recent publishes and plan board. Document any conflicting URLs or 'none found'.

serp_notes.description: Observed SERP patterns for the primary keyword (titles, snippets, common H2 themes). Separated from recommendations.

geo_aeo.description: GEO / AEO optimization specification. Required for informational and commercial intent. Answer-first structure is mandatory.

answer_first_block.description: Draft opening answer (≤60 words) for the main article or first H2. Placed immediately after H2 heading, before elaboration.

query_fan_out.description: 3–5 related sub-questions from People Also Ask + LLM suggestions that the article must address.

answer_format_per_section.description: Specifies the answer format for each H2 section. Matches the format AI engines prefer for the query type.

answer_first_note.description: Optional guidance for the answer-first block in this specific section.

fact_density_target.description: Minimum verifiable data points required. Default: 3 per 500 words (statistics, expert quotes, specific numbers).

ai_overview_presence.description: Whether primary keyword currently triggers a Google AI Overview.

perplexity_citation_patterns.description: Observed citation patterns for primary keyword in Perplexity — which sources are cited, what format they use.

ai_bot_crawlability.description: Robots.txt crawlability check for AI bots. Flag any blocks.

status.description: Whether OAI-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, BingBot are allowed in robots.txt.

notes.description: Details on any blocks or partial restrictions found.

on_page_plan.description: Title, meta, slug, H2 outline, and FAQ planning.

meta_options.description: Meta description options, each ≤160 chars, containing primary keyword.

slug_recommendation.description: Recommended URL slug aligned with primary keyword and site overlay slug rules.

h3s.description: Optional H3 sub-headings under this H2.

h2_outline.description: Ordered list of H2 headings forming the article structure.

faq_included.description: True if a FAQ block is recommended for this article based on SERP/PAA patterns.

faq_questions.description: Suggested FAQ questions when faq_included is true. Maps to FAQPage schema.

out_of_scope.description: Topics explicitly out of scope for this article to prevent scope creep.

eeat_gates.description: E-E-A-T quality gates required before Content Writer ships the draft.

experience_proof_required.description: Type of firsthand experience signal required. Cannot be fabricated — Content Writer must flag gap and escalate if unavailable.

experience_proof_notes.description: Additional context on what type of proof is expected (e.g. photo of the neighborhood, comparison of actual lease contracts).

profile_url.description: URL of author profile page with Person schema.

trust_signals.description: Trust signals that must be present in the published article.

claim_policy.description: Claim policy enforcement statement. Default: every major factual claim must have a credible source or specific data point.

ymyl_escalation_note.description: If ymyl_adjacent is true, document what additional review or Researcher escalation is required.

schema_requirements.description: Structured data requirements for Frontend implementation. SEO Analyst specifies; Frontend implements JSON-LD.

schema_types.description: Required schema types for this page. Article is always included.

author_schema_required.description: Whether Person schema for the author is required.

faq_schema_required.description: Whether FAQPage schema is required (when faq_included is true).

entity_id_strategy.description: Stable @id pattern for Organization or Person entities, e.g. https://leaseinvietnam.com/#organization.

technical_seo_ticket.description: Summary of schema spec for Frontend implementation ticket. Include entity relationships and @id patterns.

internal_links.description: Internal link plan. Minimum 3 links required per site baseline.

target.description: Target path or URL (repo-relative or absolute).

rationale.description: Why this link is included — topical relevance, high-value property/product page, pillar page, etc.

high_value.description: True if this is a high-value property/* or product/* link (weekly quota tracking).

seo_publishing_overlay.description: Fields specific to the seo-publishing dual-site sprint overlay. Included when overlay is active.

sprint_date.description: Sprint day this brief belongs to (YYYY-MM-DD).

board_row_ref.description: Reference to the seo-weekly-board.json entry_id this brief is tied to.

notes.description: Any additional handoff context or open questions for the receiving role.

contracts.description: Related contract files for this handoff.

context.working_title: Thu Thiem Neighborhood Guide 2026: Renting as an Expat
context.audience: Expats considering renting in Thu Thiem / District 2

topical_authority.information_gain: First-person walkthrough of Thu Thiem 2026 infrastructure, actual rental price ranges from listings, comparison with nearby An Phu pricing

keywords.cannibalization_check: No existing Lease posts target thu-thiem as primary keyword in last 7 days. Checked publish-log 2026-06-05 to 2026-06-11.
keywords.serp_notes: Top results include blog posts from 2023–2024. No AI Overview found. Perplexity cites Expat.com and PropertyGuru. FAQ section present in 3 of top 5 results.

geo_aeo.answer_first_block: Thu Thiem is a modern riverside district in Ho Chi Minh City offering expat-friendly apartments from $700–$2,500/month, with new infrastructure completed in 2024 and easy Metro Line 1 access.
query_fan_out: Is Thu Thiem good for expats?
What is the average rent in Thu Thiem?
How does Thu Thiem compare to District 1?
What amenities are available in Thu Thiem?
Is Thu Thiem safe to live in?

answer_format_per_section.h2_heading: Thu Thiem vs District 2: Which is Better?

geo_aeo.fact_density_target: Minimum 3 verifiable data points per 500 words (rental price ranges, transit times, building completion dates)
geo_aeo.perplexity_citation_patterns: Expat.com forum posts, PropertyGuru listings cited. Answer format is bullet list of pros/cons.

ai_bot_crawlability.notes: Check robots.txt at leaseinvietnam.com before publish.

title_options.title: Thu Thiem Neighborhood Guide 2026 | Expat Renting Tips
Living in Thu Thiem: Expat Rental Guide 2026

meta_options.meta: Complete guide to renting in Thu Thiem in 2026. Rental prices, best streets, transport links, and expat tips for District 2's newest neighborhood.

h2_outline.notes: Focus on where expats are actually living

h2_outline.h2: Thu Thiem vs District 2: Which is Better?

faq_questions: Is Thu Thiem good for expats?
What is the average rent in Thu Thiem in 2026?
How do I get from Thu Thiem to District 1?

eeat_gates.experience_proof_notes: Include firsthand account of the neighborhood walkability, noise levels, and supermarket access, or source from a verified expat resident interview.

author_entity.credentials: Vietnam real estate editorial team with 5+ years on-the-ground experience

eeat_gates.claim_policy: All rental price ranges must be sourced from current listings or market reports. All transit times must be verifiable.

schema_requirements.technical_seo_ticket: Implement Article + FAQPage JSON-LD. Author Person schema pointing to /about/team. BreadcrumbList: Home > Neighborhoods > Thu Thiem Guide.

internal_links.rationale: Pillar page link from cluster article
High-value property listing page — weekly quota
Trust-safety supporting content for new expats

handoff.notes: GEO/AEO fields complete. Schema spec ready for Frontend after publish.
